Landath stands in front of the Old Guest-house, in the First Circle, just south of the City Gates. Show Landath that the letter has been re-sealed.
Master Aglarang should be at the Smiths' Fellow-hall, in the northern part of the Third Circle. If you should get separated from Landath, use Bergil's…
The Smiths' Market lies just north of the Pier, the Court of Eärnil lies south of the Pier, and the Merry Swan lies on the far south of the Third Circ…
The Forges of Cirion are in the northern stretch of the Third Circle. If you should get separated from Landath, use Bergil's whistle to call him back.…

The Old Guest-house lies in the First Circle, just south of the City Gates. Meet Landath back at the Old Guest-house.
